llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 10.4-10.7 pulled to next regular meeting. Items 11.6 and 11.7 moved from action to consent agenda.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: And a roll call vote, please. Trustee McBride? Aye. Trustee Marquez. Aye. Trustee Diaz Locum? Vice President McAvoy? Aye. President Lawson. Aye.
